name: Super Chain Crusher Horizon
short_description: Super Chain Crusher Horizon is the largest, longest, most incredible PC shooting game in history with a two-player mode that is revolutionary. And, it’s loaded with game modes that solve the problems had by most shoot ‘em ups.
detailed_description:
Eclipses the normal Windows game　with 3200x800 pixelsfor ultra widescreen shooting!
Let loose a series of chained chained explosions on this massive screen, the likes of which have never been seen before!
Completely fill a long 2000 pixel ultra-charge-shot gauge to unleash a massive explosion 2000 pixels wide!
It blows away all standards and crushes the competition!
Introducing Super Chain Crusher Horizon!
